title: SimpleVoice-Geyser
description: This project extends Simple Voice Chat to Bedrock edition through a web interface.
body:
- Simple Voice Geyser is a Bukkit plugin that lets Bedrock players on Geyser servers use Simple Voice Chat, even though they can’t install client-side mods.

- It’s made for servers that want both Java and Bedrock players to be able to use proximity voice chat with no extra setup for players.

## What it does
- Allows Bedrock players to connect to Simple Voice Chat
- Java Players not using SVC can also join.
- Works alongside GeyserMC
- No mods required for Bedrock players
- Simple, and lightweight to install:
     - Please note that port forwarding or a proxy is required to be able to access it from other networks.
     - see https://theodoremeyer.github.io/projects/simplevoicegeyser/installation/
- Option to restrict to only bedrock players.
- Includes Geyser Cumulus forms.


## Requirements
1. A Minecraft Sever: Bukkit or Fabric based server
2. GeyserMC (optional)
3. Floodgate (optional)
4. LuckPerms (optional, only for fabric) 
5. Simple Voice Chat 2.6.0 or later

## Notes:
- This is not a drop-in for Simple Voice Chat, it works alongside it.
- ** ⚠️ Important:** Audio is not currently encoded, as that is a work in progress. When using this project over different networks (WAN), please run behind a proxy to encrypt the connection (make the website https:// instead of http://).

## Status
This project is being developed and open to feedback, issues, and contributions. It is still in its Dev stage.

Please give feedback at the github page so that I can help ya'll.

If I have enough people who say it works, I'll release 1.0.0 quickly.
